heading: Coins treated as gifts
label: 2273 Coins treated as gifts
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). inserted “, and maintaining fountains under the jurisdiction of the Architect of the Capitol” before period at end of first sentence.Pub. L. 117–103
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (c). inserted “, and maintaining fountains under the jurisdiction of the Architect of the Capitol” before period at end of first sentence.Pub. L. 117–103

children.text: the grounds described under ;section 5102 of title 40
the Capitol Buildings defined under , including the Capitol Visitor Center; andsection 5101 of title 40
the Library of Congress buildings and grounds described under .section 167j of this title
such coins shall be treated as gifts to the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: collect such coins at such times and in such manner as the Architect determines appropriate; and

children.label: B
children.text: except as provided under subsection (c), deposit the collected coins in accordance with subsection (d).

children.heading: Cost reimbursement
children.label: c Cost reimbursement
children.text: Any amount collected under this section shall first be used to reimburse the Architect of the Capitol for any costs incurred in the collection and processing of the coins, and maintaining fountains under the jurisdiction of the Architect of the Capitol. The amount of any such reimbursement is appropriated to the account from which such costs were paid and may be used for any authorized purpose of that account.

children.heading: Deposit of coins
children.label: d Deposit of coins
children.text: The Architect of the Capitol shall deposit coins collected under this section in the Miscellaneous Receipts Account of the Capitol Visitor Center Revolving Fund established under .section 2231 of this title

children.heading: Authorized use and availability
children.label: e Authorized use and availability
children.text: Amounts deposited in the Miscellaneous Receipts Account of the Capitol Visitor Center Revolving Fund under this section shall be available as provided under .section 2233(b) of this title
